top_signals.title: Crypto industry looks to stablecoins and DeFi revisions in MiCA 2.0
top_signals.summary: The European Commission is seeking comment on how it can tweak MiCA, its regulatory framework for the crypto and blockchain industries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: King Charles to publish tax bill for ‘transparency’
top_signals.summary: The King is to become the first head of state to reveal their personal tax bill to help enhance transparency around royal finances. Charles will publish his financial details as his royal household seeks to increase “clarity and accessibility” around the monarchy’s finances by producing a new report on the subject. The decision by the King, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
